title: Just Another Coffe - Jac
description: Just another coffe probably? But done right! Hot coffee mod!
body:
Use 3 Diorite and craft a bowl with it to get a coffee pot. \
Use redstone with cocoa beans to get coffee beans. \
Beans + coffee cup = cup of coffee. \
Put quartz on a coffee cup with an smithing table to get rainbow coffee cups.\
\
It support German, English, Lolcat, Kölsch and Low German.\
 \

- Cats eating coffee for more spice
